hooks.command: $status = git -C 'C:\Users\Asus\Documents\gamgamproject' status --porcelain; if ($status) { $date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'; git -C 'C:\Users\Asus\Documents\gamgamproject' add -A; git -C 'C:\Users\Asus\Documents\gamgamproject' commit -m "auto: sync changes $date"; git -C 'C:\Users\Asus\Documents\gamgamproject' push }
